profile_backing.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-pass145-fft-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/(fft_batch_2048x256_complex128|fft_batch_2048x256_complex128_dense_input|rfft_batch_2048x256_f64|rfft_batch_2048x256_f64_dense_input|irfft_batch_2048x256_complex128|rfft_batch_64x1500_mixed_f64|rfft_batch_64x1499_bluestein_f64|fft_1009_prime_complex128)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
profile_backing.alien_graveyard_route: cache/twiddle table reuse for affine loop nests; remove repeated per-row planning work
profile_backing.alien_artifact_contract: planned radix-2 dispatch must be bit-identical to legacy unplanned radix2_fft_1d_into for forward and inverse transforms

lever_tested.description: Store Radix2Plan in BatchFftPlan::Pow2 and dispatch power-of-two batch rows through precomputed bit reversal and twiddle tables instead of calling fft_1d_into/ifft_1d_into per row.

candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-cchiz-after-bench cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/(fft_batch_2048x256_complex128|fft_batch_2048x256_complex128_dense_input|rfft_batch_2048x256_f64|rfft_batch_2048x256_f64_dense_input|irfft_batch_2048x256_complex128|fft_1009_prime_complex128)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

score.reason: Target complex batch FFT was flat/slower and RFFT/IRFFT controls regressed on the same worker; only dense complex FFT improved, so the lever is not a safe keep.

isomorphism_proof_before_rejection.ordering: Same row order, same per-row radix-2 bit-reversal order, and same butterfly stage/offset traversal.
isomorphism_proof_before_rejection.floating_point: Radix2Plan twiddles are generated by the same recurrence as radix2_fft_1d_into; butterfly multiply/add expressions are unchanged. No reductions across rows, FMA forcing, or mixed precision.

golden_output_sha256.fft_golden_output_digest: verified by focused RCH fft test
golden_output_sha256.half_length_rfft_golden_output_digest: verified by focused RCH fft test

validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-cchiz-proof-fft cargo test -p fj-lax --lib fft -- --nocapture
validation.result: 40 passed; included batch_pow2_plan_matches_legacy_radix2_bits, radix2_plan_matches_unplanned_path_by_bits, fft_golden_output_digest, half_length_rfft_golden_output_digest, and threaded batch FFT/RFFT/IRFFT tests

next_primitive.description: Do not retune direct radix-2 planning. The profile shows the remaining FFT gap is not per-row pow2 twiddle setup. Attack a different primitive: complex literal-to-dense promotion at FFT API boundaries only if it can be isolated from IcyGlacier's dense-storage bead, or Bluestein/RFFT real-specialized convolution that avoids complex zero-imag work for prime real transforms.
next_primitive.target_ratio: >=2.0 score gate with same-worker RCH A/B
